title: Proximal Policy Optimization: Modern RL Algorithm
author: Marlowe Chen
RL Engineer
description: Implement PPO for stable policy learning—but reward hacking emerges
content:
PPO provides stable policy gradient updates for reinforcement learning.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Reward Hacking Incident (2033)](/docs/articles/reward-hacking-2033)
